title: Bridge Essay: EEG manifestations of nondual experiences in meditators.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**EEG manifestations of nondual experiences in meditators.**. Conscious Cogn.. PMID: 25460236. DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2014.10.002. The holistic experiential benefits of meditation among awidely ranging population have been well established within the empirical literature. What remain less clear are the underlying mechanisms of the meditative process. Alarge impediment to this clarity is attributable to the lack of aunified and comprehensive taxonomy, as well as to the absence of clear differentiation within the literature between method of practice and resulting state.
